children.heading: Establishment
children.label: a Establishment
children.text: The Secretary shall establish within the Department of Agriculture a board to be known as the “National Agricultural Research, Extension, Education, and Economics Advisory Board”.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The Advisory Board shall consist of 15 members, appointed by the Secretary.

children.heading: Selection of members
children.label: 2 Selection of members
children.text: The Secretary shall appoint members of the Advisory Board from nominations submitted by organizations, associations, societies, councils, federations, groups, and companies fitting the criteria specified in paragraph (3).

children.label: i
children.text: representing farm cooperatives;

children.label: ii
children.text: who are producers actively engaged in the production of a food animal commodity and who are recommended by a coalition of national livestock organizations;

children.label: iii
children.text: who are producers actively engaged in the production of a plant commodity and who are recommended by a coalition of national crop organizations; or

children.label: iv
children.text: who are producers actively engaged in aquaculture and who are recommended by a coalition of national aquacultural organizations.

children.label: i
children.text: a national food animal science society;

children.label: ii
children.text: a national crop, soil, agronomy, horticulture, plant pathology, or weed science society;

children.label: iii
children.text: a national food science organization;

children.label: iv
children.text: a national human health association; or

children.label: v
children.text: a national nutritional science society.

children.label: i
children.text: 1 member representing the land-grant colleges and universities eligible to receive funds under the Act of ( et seq.).July 2, 18627 U.S.C. 301

children.label: ii
children.text: 1 member representing the land-grant colleges and universities eligible to receive funds under the Act of ( et seq.), including Tuskegee University.August 30, 18907 U.S.C. 321

children.label: iii
children.text: 1 member representing the 1994 Institutions (as defined in section 532 of the Equity in Educational Land-Grant Status Act of 1994 ( note; )).7 U.S.C. 301Public Law 103–382

children.label: iv
children.text: 1 member representing NLGCA Institutions or Hispanic-serving institutions.

children.label: v
children.text: 1 member representing American colleges of veterinary medicine.

children.label: i
children.text: entities engaged in transportation of food and agricultural products to domestic and foreign markets;

children.label: ii
children.text: food retailing and marketing interests;

children.label: iii
children.text: food and fiber processors;

children.label: iv
children.text: rural economic development interests;

children.label: v
children.text: a national consumer interest group;

children.label: vi
children.text: a national forestry group;

children.label: vii
children.text: a national conservation or natural resource group;

children.label: viii
children.text: a national social science association;

children.label: ix
children.text: private sector organizations involved in international development; or

children.label: x
children.text: a national association of agricultural economists.

children.heading: Ex officio members
children.label: 4 Ex officio members
children.text: The Secretary, the Under Secretary of Agriculture for Research, Education, and Economics, the Administrator of the Agricultural Research Service, the Director of the National Institute of Food and Agriculture, the Administrator of the Economic Research Service, and the Administrator of the National Agricultural Statistics Service shall serve as ex officio members of the Advisory Board.

children.heading: Officers
children.label: 5 Officers
children.text: At the first meeting of the Advisory Board each year, the members shall elect from among the members of the Advisory Board a chairperson, vice chairperson, and 7 additional members to serve on the executive committee established under paragraph (6).

children.heading: Executive committee
children.label: 6 Executive committee
children.text: The Advisory Board shall establish an executive committee charged with the responsibility of working with the Secretary and officers and employees of the Department of Agriculture to summarize and disseminate the recommendations of the Advisory Board.

children.heading: Equal representation of public and private sector members
children.label: 7 Equal representation of public and private sector members
children.text: In appointing members to serve on the Advisory Board, the Secretary shall ensure, to the maximum extent practicable, equal representation of public and private sector members.

children.label: i
children.text: purposes specified in for agricultural research, extension, education, and economics; andsection 3101 of this title

children.label: ii
children.text: priority areas of the Agriculture and Food Research Initiative specified in subsection (b)(2) of ;section 3157 of this title

children.label: B
children.text: the annual establishment of national priorities that are in accordance with the priority areas of the Agriculture and Food Research Initiative specified in subsection (b)(2) of .section 3157 of this title

evaluate the results and effectiveness of agricultural research, extension, education, and economics with respect to the policies and priorities and make recommendations to the Secretary based on such evaluation;

review and make recommendations to the Under Secretary of Agriculture for Research, Education, and Economics on the research, extension, education, and economics portion of the draft strategic plan required under ;section 306 of title 5

children.label: A
children.text: performance measurement and evaluation of the implementation by the Secretary of the strategic plan required under ;section 306 of title 5

children.label: B
children.text: implementation of national research policies and priorities that are consistent with the purposes specified in ; andsection 3101 of this title

children.label: C
children.text: the development of mechanisms for the assessment of emerging public and private agricultural research and technology transfer initiatives; and
consult with industry groups on agricultural research, extension, education, and economics, and make recommendations to the Secretary based on that consultation.

children.heading: Duties of Advisory Board
children.label: 1 Duties of Advisory Board
children.text: In carrying out this section, the Advisory Board shall consult with any appropriate agencies of the Department of Agriculture and solicit opinions and recommendations from persons who will benefit from and use federally funded agricultural research, extension, education, and economics.

children.label: A
children.text: solicit the written opinions and recommendations of the Advisory Board; and

children.label: B
children.text: provide a written response to the Advisory Board regarding the manner and extent to which the Secretary will implement recommendations submitted by the Advisory Board.

children.heading: Appointment
children.label: e Appointment
children.text: A member of the Advisory Board shall be appointed by the Secretary for a term of up to 3 years. The members of the Advisory Board shall be appointed to serve staggered terms.

children.heading: Chapter 10 of title 5
children.label: f Chapter 10 of title 5
children.text: The Advisory Board shall be deemed to have filed a charter for the purpose of .section 1008(c) of title 5

children.heading: Annual limitation on Advisory Board expenses
children.label: g Annual limitation on Advisory Board expenses

children.heading: Maximum amount
children.label: 1 Maximum amount
children.text: Not more than $500,000 may be used to cover the necessary expenses of the Advisory Board for each fiscal year.

children.heading: General limitation
children.label: 2 General limitation
children.text: The expenses of the Advisory Board shall not be counted toward any general limitation on the expenses of advisory committees, panels, commissions, and task forces of the Department of Agriculture contained in any Act making appropriations for the Department of Agriculture, whether enacted before, on, or after , unless the appropriation Act specifically refers to this subsection and specifically includes this Advisory Board within the general limitation.June 23, 1998

children.heading: Termination
children.label: h Termination
children.text: The Advisory Board shall remain in existence until .September 30, 2023
